reviews.text:
Amanda went above and beyond for my elopement photos. I honestly cannot praise her enough. She was so communicative and responsive during the lead up to our ceremony. She answered all our questions about locations, vendors, and working with the national parks to get permits. On the day of our ceremony, she kept all our guests in order and directed everyone so that we got all the group shots we wanted. In that way, she was more than a photographer.

Her photography, however, was the real magic. I told her I would be happy if my husband and I got 3-5 good photos out of our session. I was floored when I got my full gallery. They were beautifully shot and delicately edited to enhance without detracting from the natural beauty of the landscape. She had coached us into some poses that felt a little unnatural at the time but created the most breathtaking photos. I hung up one of my favorite photos on my wall, and I smile every time I see it. She captured everything I wanted from that day.

I’d highly recommend working with Amanda. She is a true professional in every sense of the word.

Beautiful photos and such a nice person! Amanda is a very talented photographer who guided us through the entire elopement process via helpful emails and meetings. All of our friends and family can't stop telling us how amazing our photos are. I am not great at posing and don't take many photos of myself, but with Amanda I felt at ease and she was so good at telling us how to pose and what to do. She came recommended to us through our officiant when I told her that I wanted someone calm who wouldn't be over the top. Since we eloped just the two of us, I was very intentional about the people who were going to be there. Amanda was perfect, she was calm, kind and easy to talk to. She was never stressed and she didn't make us do things that were out of our comfort zone. She stuck to the plan we discussed and was also up for a couple last minute changes that I wanted to include. I can't recommend her enough. If you want amazing photos and a genuine person who takes them then hire Amanda!

Amanda photographed our wedding and was so wonderful to work with! Professional, super responsive and on top of things, answered all of my many questions patiently and thoroughly and helped us figure out our timeline, and was all around a fantastic person to have on our wedding team. Our photos are so gorgeous and we're so excited to display them in our home ❤️

Amanda’s work is incredible. She shares thoughtful, helpful tips throughout the months leading up to your special day and has a fantastic vendor list to guide you. She is professional, thorough, and navigates the day  seamlessly, quietly, and always present without ever interfering. She even helps with those last minute touches like putting on your cuff links or assisting with your boutonnières. She captured so many great moments and we couldn’t be happier!

Amanda is such a joy to work with! She took branding photos for my massage therapy business and I’m honestly so happy with how they turned out. She has a laid-back, easy-going vibe that made the whole shoot feel comfortable and natural, and it definitely shows in the photos. She captured exactly what I was hoping for and then some. I’d highly recommend Amanda to anyone looking for a photographer who’s talented, professional, and just really easy to be around.
